title: Unexpected Result byCRC32() and SIN() Functions
description:
## Bug Report

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```sql
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 BIGINT);
INSERT t0 VALUES(1674610777);
SELECT t0.c0 FROM t0 WHERE CRC32(SIN(t0.c0)) >= t0.c0; -- Empty set
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
`CRC32(SIN(t0.c0))` = 1782146908, which is greater than 1674610777, so this query should return one row, instead of empty.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

```bash
+--------------------------------------------+
| version()                                  |
+--------------------------------------------+
| 8.0.11-TiDB-v9.0.0-beta.1.pre-563-gea52376 |
+--------------------------------------------+
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 FLOAT, c2 INT, c3 VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE t2(c4 BIGINT NOT NULL, c5 DECIMAL(10,2));
SELECT t1.c1 FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON MOD(CAST(t1.c1 AS INT), 4294967296) >= t2.c4 WHERE t1.c2 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: CRC32() and SIN() functions return unexpected results
